positive: A majestic, highly stylized celestial flora arrangement, featuring glowing nebula patterns intertwined with geometric mandalas and minimalist silhouette leaves. The composition must be perfectly centered and contained within a circular frame, maximizing negative space for clean print application. Use a vibrant color palette of deep indigo, neon magenta, electric turquoise, and brilliant gold foil accents. Style should be a blend of Art Nouveau elegance and modern low-poly geometry, rendered with crisp linework, strong contrast, and soft, ethereal cosmic glow. Ideal for a repeat or central emblem on high-quality apparel. Hyperdetailed, graphic novel quality, clean vector lines.
negative: blurry, messy, grunge, noise, watermark, text, logos, signatures, lowres, bad anatomy, extra limbs, bokeh, grainy, cropped, jpeg artifacts
